- [ ] Risky work does not use self-review.

## Safety

- [ ] This PR does not modify unrelated product examples or fixtures.
- [ ] This PR does not weaken the agent constitution.
- [ ] This PR does not add autonomous self-modification.
- [ ] This PR does not add auto-merge.
- [ ] This PR keeps generated files derived from source files.
